current_provider.model_name_note: DeepSeek official docs state deepseek-chat becomes a compatibility alias for deepseek-v4-flash non-thinking mode on 2026-07-24 at 15:59 UTC. Current code still allows deepseek-chat.

infrastructure.assumption: Conservative planning includes Cloudflare Workers Paid minimum monthly platform charge. The tested 5/50/100 user scenarios are expected to stay within included Workers/D1 request-volume allowances, so variable infrastructure cost is modeled as 0 until measured otherwise.

source.name: Federal Reserve H.10 Foreign Exchange Rates, China yuan per U.S. dollar

exchange_rate.note: USD values remain authoritative for provider bills; CNY conversion is for runway planning only.
